name: Skibidi Stick
description: Stretch the stick the more you can to reach and walk on the platforms. Beware! If the stick is not long enough, Skibidi will fall down! Get yourself in the ninja action! How far can you go?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Casual, HTML, Mobile, Puzzle, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet, Stickman
